COMLAINT FILED: 12/30/3 #7 JDG ROBERT A. BARCLAY. CSR BELDON YEE. CLERK MSANCHEZ. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COUNSEL FOR PLTF PRESENT. DEFT IN PRO PER PRESENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT..

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORMISANC, SAL AKA SALVATOR FORMISANO SEWELL, DAVID THE COURT HAVING HEARD THE EVIDENCE AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING IT IS HEREBY ORDERED ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT JUDGMENT BE GIVEN FOR PLAINTIFF, TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES INC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS SAL FORMISANO AKA SALVADOR FORMISANO AND DAVID SEWELL FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 2133 STOCKTON STREET #D102 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FOR THE SUM OF $1,916.52 RENT AND RENTAL DAMAGES, $185.00 COST AND $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES. THE LEASE AGREEMENT BY WHICH DEFENDANTS HELD THE POSSESSION OF THE REAL PROPERTY IS DECLARED FORFEITED.
